show_world: Show the world that you mean business.
congratulations: Congratulations on achieving the requirements to upgrade your page to a verified blue badge! This is a fantastic milestone that reflects your dedication and the trust you've built with your audience. We're thrilled to celebrate this moment with you and look forward to seeing your page thrive with this prestigious recognition!
rule_1: Fact checkers may not respond to requests containing intimidation, hate speech, or verbal threats
rule_2: In your request, please provide all required information to ensure timely processing by the fact checker. Submitting an invalid email address or failing to reply to requests for additional information within 2 days may lead to the application being closed without review. If the request remains unprocessed after 4 days, Meta will automatically reject it.
rule_3: Once all details are submitted, we will evaluate your account to check for any restrictions. The verification process typically takes 24 hours, though it may extend in some cases. Based on our decision, restrictions will either remain or be lifted, and your account will be updated accordingly.
verified_badge_description: The badge means your profile was verified by Meta based on a number of authenticity signals and human review.
impersonation_protection_description: Proactive monitoring helps find and remove accounts that might be copying your business.
enhanced_support_description: Get access to human support agents to help troubleshoot account or billing issues faster.
upgraded_profile_features_description: Unlock tools that make it easier to showcase your brand, connect with customers, and drive conversions.
faq_subtitle: For more, visit our Help Center (Instagram and Facebook).
faq_q1: How do I know if my business is eligible?
faq_a1: Meta Verified is available in selected regions for businesses that meet content eligibility requirements for Facebook and Instagram, as outlined in Meta's policies.
faq_q2: How can I stay informed if I'm not yet eligible?
faq_a2: Join the waitlist and we'll notify you as soon as Meta Verified for Business becomes available in your country or industry.
faq_q3: I already have a verified badge. What happens to it?
faq_a3: Legacy verified badges will remain, but Meta Verified unlocks additional protection, support, and profile enhancements tailored to businesses.
faq_q4: What if I am interested in Meta Verified for creators?
faq_a4: Visit the Meta Verified for creators help center to explore offerings and pricing specific to creators.
faq_a5: Once your documentation is reviewed, your badge will appear on the selected profiles automatically. We'll send status updates via email.
